name: Andrew Yang
subject: Whether this campaign rises or falls depends on you -- not big donors or PAC support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9) Yang Gang --

At some point, people will stop underestimating us.

They will stop underestimating our diverse coalition of supporters of every age, background, and belief. And they will stop underestimating what goals we can achieve and what heights we can reach.

The truth is that this election has never been about the establishment in DC or the media -- it’s always been about you. **The power you and people across this country hold to build a grassroots movement.**

Our message is hitting home, and people are waking up. That’s how we’ve risen to 4th place nationally in some polls despite other candidates having more name recognition and the support of big-dollar donors. It’s also how we are building a competitive presidential campaign with an overwhelming majority of our funds coming from grassroots donors like you.

**I’m proud of this fact, and the knowledge that whether this campaign rises or falls is dependent on our ideas and you -- not big donors or PAC support.**

Yang Gang, we have one more chance to show our grassroots strength before the Democratic debate on Tuesday. My team set a big goal, but I know if we all work together we can hit it.

**[Can you pitch in before the Democratic debate on Tuesday so we can hit this goal of 40,000 contributions? This is a chance for the Yang Gang to show our power on a national stage:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13430?t=5&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9)** | [pitch in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13430?t=7&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9)
---
We’re going to make history in 2020.

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13430?t=6&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1638%2E377263%2EpT6Io9) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Cory Booker
subject: 254 days ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I need to call it a night soon. (We have a big week ahead of us!) But I wanted to send you a quick note before I do. Knowing how much is at stake in the days ahead, I can't help but look back in awe at how we got here. It's been 254 days since we launched this campaign. I think we both know there were people who didn't think an underdog campaign like ours would be in the spot we're in today -- preparing for our fourth debate, and already clinching a spot on stage in November. We've faced tough polling requirements, steep grassroots donor thresholds, more than two dozen candidates, and a few frontrunners who have major head starts. At every potential roadblock, it's this team that's pulled us through. And it's thanks to people like you that we're not just hanging around -- we're actually ramping up our grassroots operation in key states and building an infrastructure that rivals the leading candidates. We're running a campaign that can win. Team, I'm humbled and honored to be a candidate in this race. As we head into perhaps the most critical weeks of this campaign, **I want you to know that I 'll never forget the people who helped get me here. ** It's about to be crunch time. Voters are starting to think seriously about the choice they have to make. If you're thinking about getting involved, there won't be a more important time to do it. [**Can I ask you to chip in tonight to help keep this campaign moving forward as strong as we can so we can make the most of this moment?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191013_CB_20191013-fr-CB-254-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you. Yesterday was the day 1 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites.
Before my walk across New Hampshire began, though, my early morning was spent in the border town of Brattleboro, VT! You may find it interesting to know that the first ever social security benefit check was issued to a citizen of Brattleboro in 1940. Ever since that New Deal, our nation has continued to evolve in how we provide care towards each other, and we still have a long way to go.
For example, many insurers still don’t cover the cost of mental healthcare. That’s especially troubling when considering that Mental Health America’s annual report has shown that the mental health of our youth and adults is getting worse. Almost 60 percent of youth with major depression and 57 percent of adults with mental illness receive no treatment. This is a major issue that needs to be addressed.
I support fixing mental health care beginning with full enforcement of the mental health parity and addiction act. Those who need help should be able to attend institutions such as the wonderful Brattleboro Retreat. For over 150 years the Brattleboro Retreat has been adhering to concepts of moral treatment while integrating advanced methods of care. The retreat was kind enough to show me around the facilities and to introduce me to patients. For those patients, and the millions more who are unable to afford mental healthcare, we must ensure mental health parity. In the photo below, you can view a few of the scores of patches from first responder stations and military units whose personnel have been supported.
For more about my time in Brattleboro, [[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10842194/109664060/910707330?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjhlYjQ2NC03OGVlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-4eHyRpaEwlZSj2o_Kc8AcC-4aplgf0maxphBxStx4=&emci=ac1ef056-38ed-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=4f8eb464-78ee-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&s=20)].
At that point, I decided to cross the Navy Seabees bridge into New Hampshire, and thus began my walk across the Granite State. The first day of my walk was especially meaningful given that it came on October 13th, the Navy’s birthday. The motto for this year, “No Higher Honor,” which were the words penned by the Commanding Officer of the USS Samuel B. Roberts, which was lost during the battle — and was the motto of the third ship named Samuel B. Roberts, which I commanded.
My walk took me to Keene, NH, with a couple detours along the way. At 1 PM, just after passing Chesterfield, I stuck a stake in the ground, hopped into a car, and drove to Antrim to meet with Local Democrats. Afterwards, I drove to Marlborough to visit a Caterpillar Lab and the self-proclaimed “Caterpillar Czar”. I saw up close and personal the natural beauty that surrounds us every day, beauty that we often take for granted. We must maintain healthy habitats for the creatures who populate our world and for our posterity.
My walk finished in Keene around 10 PM. While in town, I had coffee with locals. We spoke about restoring the American Dream.
I’m now kicking off day 2, where I’ll be traveling from Keene to Dublin. Here’s my schedule for the day:
* **Keene. Walk begins at 8:30am.**
* **Keene. **_Visiting prisoners and administrators_ at Cheshire County Department of Corrections, 825 Marlboro Street at 10am.
* **Dublin. **_Citizens United _event at Dublin Public Library, 1114 Main Street at 3pm (T).
* **Merrimack. **_Veterans and military families_ event at VFW Post 8641 Auxiliary Meeting at 6pm.
* **Somersworth. **_Town meeting _organized by local Democrats at the Teatotaller, 69 High St at 7:45pm.
* **Dublin. End of day’s walk.**

**For more information, please check out our events page ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10842195/109664061/-2096730744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjhlYjQ2NC03OGVlLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p-4eHyRpaEwlZSj2o_Kc8AcC-4aplgf0maxphBxStx4=&emci=ac1ef056-38ed-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=)).**

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Cancel Columbus Day?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Today we celebrate Columbus Day - an opportunity to recognize the explorer who chartered a path to the new world as well as honor the accomplishments of all Italian Americans. But not everyone is celebrating.
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WgIs31BBctIw5CyDFfLrBmJcDVT4-XjfvP3VfpxOWBY0thpBdIc5b6HU6r86rmZjeTUfqRXDYZwcWAs9-ITnHrLtwXCZcW3iWA==&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==)
---
| Friend,
Today we celebrate Columbus Day - an opportunity to recognize the explorer who chartered a path to the new world as well as honor the accomplishments of all Italian Americans.
But not everyone is celebrating. The radical leftists continue to try to destroy our history and reshape our country with their extreme policies as they work to end Columbus Day.
[Elizabeth Warren](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfToSBgNfdXB5G0o8ihXRiFK1x8r1mSibtiIUT6RUQz0h2t0-ZFKxDlX2q-FqRYG74tgbz86h-3DhINqemrqeyxp3t1-RvKxc7x0PLMT7KdqE0CDiEy60_eiYTAACLiOY048a-6mpJ6cCY=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==) and [Kamala Harris](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTdIxIK899lWlYCC5P35M6nfGrV8aFjGV1DOtfxZPN1Cp_FXO_A4VfMyV2KFwu8oykglF6ZgZil7ut6OXCUtiEKtx_dZsTdDvGVDnpTmtP3xkwo3rqaaRk4-TPXEe5FAP-&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==) refuse to call today Columbus Day, instead insisting that it be called "Indigenous Peoples Day", and Harris previously also called the Knights of Columbus "extreme." It's ridiculous that we can't celebrate Christopher Columbus and honor Italian Americans today without offending liberals.
[In 2017, I fought back when Mayor de Blasio formed a commission to review "symbols of hate" including the Christopher Columbus statue at Columbus Circle.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTKK7M9_431jQnbhs-hEr66gQTX0T-Md1fWtr8hfeWh9wCwhLYZmbEI3JHVuV9mi-3w2QTI2EcaGDgL-ZvEFV4ch9HVfUVvgaMAyTGbZq6byf7qbrZ9Wa1y0Q1--QZ4y6yGLbwLgIpdvgSf2CZGijfKdBcb4GbXq1GzFleEt5og6QaYJ7e1YvXlaoy1nAL2B4IKjatek9Y5lrgN1nQ6X7TGsWmzP7g7biFgwdGizYC9ns=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==) [We won and now it's a protected landmark.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTKK7M9_431jQnbhs-hEr66gQTX0T-Md1fWtr8hfeWh9wCwhLYZmbEI3JHVuV9mi-3w2QTI2EcaGDgL-ZvEFV4ch9HVfUVvgaMAyTGbZq6byf7qbrZ9Wa1y0Q1--QZ4y6yGLbwLgIpdvgSf2CZGijfKdBcb4GbXq1GzFleEt5og6QaYJ7e1YvXlaoy1nAL2B4IKjatek9Y5lrgN1nQ6X7TGsWmzP7g7biFgwdGizYC9ns=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==)
This year Bill de Blasio and his wife Chirlane completely snubbed Saint Mother Cabrini - a beacon of hope and charity in our community - for the honor of a "She Built NYC" statue, despite receiving the most votes for the honor.
I'm once again standing up to the Mayor and First Lady. In an [op-ed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTTBxthofVgWQA5wxJjCjfUrVIb0_UWN9lL_O4uPeHp82BFPWdHJqUFN0kZ_rgdSPWmV17DBDsoHY7GT4hLuOC3Fha_8CfkJq7xyKET-z8eXCeZSqej03NqPk2I52KYg2u8MStQhY1-z_LBLke79B-f1c1o9NqdbZyZzBLsfsEf1Jld93W3RZxiGspXsbl0mCCsblEuOdp_klfh5qu2DgbGFsg36QU5-Brwp0PiyfNHPdN1X1eo8lpqLG__l9t4w6mTFwlbhvv8CpZkek8BR9R8zw37lq7aAmn6VwSk4aAywK9TUhGjRiE8J48_2_bJI161zgyezIoEpc=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==), I wrote, "political correctness and a far left bias have crept into a process that should be focused on historical standing and accomplishments."
[Will you stand for de Blasio and his cronies trying to tear down our nation's history and Italian heritage?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTKK7M9_431jQnbhs-hEr66gQTX0T-Md1fWtr8hfeWh9wCwhLYZmbEI3JHVuV9mi-3w2QTI2EcaGDgL-ZvEFV4ch9HVfUVvgaMAyTGbZq6byf7qbrZ9Wa1y0Q1--QZ4y6yGLbwLgIpdvgSf2CZGijfKdBcb4GbXq1GzFleEt5og6QaYJ7e1YvXlaoy1nAL2B4IKjatek9Y5lrgN1nQ6X7TGsWmzP7g7biFgwdGizYC9ns=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==) Because I certainly won't.
[Join me today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTKK7M9_431jQnbhs-hEr66gQTX0T-Md1fWtr8hfeWh9wCwhLYZmbEI3JHVuV9mi-3w2QTI2EcaGDgL-ZvEFV4ch9HVfUVvgaMAyTGbZq6byf7qbrZ9Wa1y0Q1--QZ4y6yGLbwLgIpdvgSf2CZGijfKdBcb4GbXq1GzFleEt5og6QaYJ7e1YvXlaoy1nAL2B4IKjatek9Y5lrgN1nQ6X7TGsWmzP7g7biFgwdGizYC9ns=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==) [and let's stand up to Harris, Warren, and all the liberals by sending them packing.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BB_8yVs744sEY3Hg19ogdWTbphEXBhgl_98pz-lozoajttzzplH8WqUnwcIpxPfTKK7M9_431jQnbhs-hEr66gQTX0T-Md1fWtr8hfeWh9wCwhLYZmbEI3JHVuV9mi-3w2QTI2EcaGDgL-ZvEFV4ch9HVfUVvgaMAyTGbZq6byf7qbrZ9Wa1y0Q1--QZ4y6yGLbwLgIpdvgSf2CZGijfKdBcb4GbXq1GzFleEt5og6QaYJ7e1YvXlaoy1nAL2B4IKjatek9Y5lrgN1nQ6X7TGsWmzP7g7biFgwdGizYC9ns=&c=GtZZfeWqygljnBv1ZDbewpbKD2RRn1G_s3uxaunTwqTFRFfNP1ybYw==&ch=kzWvsL6WuAfc_gXs-g6NtGqoxTX8STTVRP9Ep2qzChcgm7YWvDfMhA==)
-Nicole

name: newsalert@andybeshear.com
subject: "Embarrassing defeat"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Bevin's campaign is flailing and now his D.C. backers are pulling out all the stops to help him out.
|
---

| | **" Trump and Pence plan 11th-hour mission to save Kentucky governor"_\-- Politico_** Peter,

It's no secret that Matt Bevin's campaign is floundering. Between fighting with his own lieutenant governor, shaking up his campaign team and trailing in the polls, his dysfunctional campaign has been making D.C. Republicans very nervous.

name: Tina Smith
subject: Not one more bad Supreme Court appointment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This case could be the biggest attack on Roe v. Wade in recent years, and we need allies in Washington to protect our rights. Will you stand with me in this fight?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191014pp-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

As the only Senator who has worked for Planned Parenthood, I have always been in their corner. And firmly believe that everyone should have access to reproductive health care.

And now more than ever, we need allies in the Senate.

Just last week, the Supreme Court announced that they will be hearing the Louisiana abortion ban during this session. And with Brett Kavanaugh on the bench, this case could be the biggest attack on Roe v. Wade in recent years.

Kavanaugh's vote could be what tips the scale on reproductive health care as we know it, and we cannot allow more anti-choice judges to be confirmed to the Supreme Court.

**What stands between us having more Kavanaughs on the Supreme Court is having pro-choice allies in the Senate. I will always stand up for reproductive health care for Minnesotans and all Americans and I need your help so I can keep fighting.

[Now more than ever, reproductive health care is on the line. Rush a donation today if you're with me in defending Planned Parenthood and defending access to abortion care.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191014pp-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc41d46/c1f7015/6702dc04/1145cc02/3902434254/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLW9jdDIwMTkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDE0cHAtZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191014pp-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

When Louisiana and other states passed these abortion bans earlier this year, we knew these threats on Roe were serious. And now that this law is being brought in front of the highest court, the threats to reproductive health care are too great.

**This is without question: Our rights are under attack. And it will take all of us standing together to defend these rights.**

**[I will do everything I can to make sure another Kavanaugh never makes it to the Supreme Court. Rush a donation now so that I can keep fighting for reproductive health care and a person's right to choose in the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-oct2019?refcode=em191014pp-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Before Elizabeth takes the debate stage tomorrow, she won't be at a fancy luncheon or on the phone with billionaire donors trying to scoop up big checks.

She'll be sitting down with the winner of our debate contest to chat about what inspired them to donate $3 to this campaign and what issues they care about.

Sharing these kinds of conversations with grassroots supporters is incredibly important to Elizabeth. And even though she can't sit down with every supporter tomorrow (although she wishes she could!) we wanted to give you an opportunity to tell her what's on your mind, too.

[**What issues matter to you in this race? Please fill out this quick survey to let Elizabeth know before tomorrow's debate.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528737/45c30650/10f00355b/66f0122c/2149878513/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUs1NFBfU1VSX0dSTV9UXzIwMTkxMDE0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMK54P_SUR_GRM_T_20191014_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326") | [ **TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528737/45c30650/10f00355b/66f0122c/2149878513/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUs1NFBfU1VSX0dSTV9UXzIwMTkxMDE0X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-warrenissuessurvey?source=EMK54P_SUR_GRM_T_20191014_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

subject: We need Congress to support democracy now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:

| | Hi Peter, The new Democratic majority in the House passed H.R. 1 back in March, a landmark election reform bill also known as the For the People Act. This bill will close campaign finance loopholes, encourage universal voter registration, and strengthen the enforcement of election laws to prevent foreign interference like we saw in 2016. But Mitch McConnell and the GOP have declared this bill a Democratic power grab because they know that if everyone could vote, Republicans would lose. Supporting free and fair elections and encouraging voter participation should be a bipartisan goal; yet, Mitch McConnel has decided to kill H.R. 1 by preventing the Senate from voting on it \-- just like he is trying to prevent millions of voters from participating in the 2020 elections. [**If you support expanding voting rights, eliminating foreign meddling, and eliminating the power of dark money in our elections, we need you to stand with us today. name: Jane Beshear
subject: so proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I'm so proud of the work that Andy has done as attorney general and I am proud to watch the campaign he is running for governor.
|
---
| | Peter,

I'm so proud of the work that Andy has done as attorney general and I am proud to watch the campaign he is running for governor. Steve and I worked hard to instill in our kids the values of faith, family and hard work. We raised them to understand that public service is not about titles or ego but instead it's about doing everything you can to help people -- it's about **treating everyone with dignity and respect**.

Andy is out there every day talking to Kentucky families about the issues that matter: access to health care, improving public education, protecting pensions and creating good-paying jobs in all areas of the state.

This is a hard-fought race that is coming down to the wire. Making sure that Andy and Jacqueline win is so important for the future of Kentucky. **Andy is giving it everything he can. Will you help him out with a donation during this final stretch? You can donate at this link:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-jane](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579ea/ad6dc73/146b31fa/db7c621/3281863286/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM1NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-jane?refcode=20191014.2nd__356__&amount=5").**

I'll be honest, I'm going to be an anxious mom for the next three weeks. I know this isn't about Andy, it's about ensuring we have a Kentucky where we're treating each other well, regardless of any political disagreements. It's about making sure we're building the kind of future I want for my grandkids and all of our children.

Thank you for everything,
Jane Beshear

Will you help him out with a donation during this final stretch? You can donate at this link: "". I'll be honest, I'm going to be an anxious mom for the next three weeks. I know this isn't about Andy, it's about ensuring we have a Kentucky where we're treating each other well, regardless of any political disagreements. It's about making sure we're building the kind of future I want for my grandkids and all of our children. Thank you for everything, Jane Beshear | "" "" Beshear/Coleman 2019 P.O. body:
I would love to have the chance to have a good meal and great conversation with you.
| | |
---
| Okay, team, it's true: I called Vedika's family during our lunch. But we also talked about our favorite movies, TV shows, and so much more. I'm glad Vedika had as much fun as I did. It's moments like these that keep me inspired and motivated during long days on the campaign trail. I would love to have the chance to have a good meal and great conversation with you, too. **Enter the contest here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191014_CB_20191014-fr-CB-dinnercontest7-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Let's nerd out, together,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Hey team, I'm Vedika! You haven't heard from me yet, but I work on the Cory 2020 analytics team. A few months ago, I won our staff fundraising challenge and as the winner, I had the chance to grab lunch with Cory here in Newark. **[If you enter our contest right now, you can have the chance to enjoy a meal with him, too! Chip in here to be automatically entered.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191014_CB_20191014-fr-CB-dinnercontest7-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** At first, Cory asked me about my background and where I went to school. **But this was my shot to spend an hour with Cory Booker, and I wasn 't going to pass up the opportunity to ask him the hard-hitting questions the people deserve to know.** I wanted to talk about our favorite movies and TV shows -- and he couldn't have been more excited to indulge me in that. During our lunch, we covered everything -- from who his favorite _Supernatural_ character is, to how much he enjoyed _Avengers: Endgame_ , to how we both cried when we watched the movie _Love, Simon_ \-- It. Was. Amazing. We even shared the same take that _Avatar: The Last Airbender_ is one of the greatest shows of all time. But my favorite moment? Cory took my phone and called my mom. **[You're missing out if you don't at least try to have the same amazing experience that I did. It's easy to automatically enter the contest. You can do so right here!](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-dinnerwcab?refcode=em_fr_20191014_CB_20191014-fr-CB-dinnercontest7-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It was so awesome and an experience I'll never forget. Of course, Cory is this genius and can talk about politics like no other. But what makes a meal with him really special is that he's just a genuinely fun, down-to-earth guy. It's not every day that you can geek out with our next president. Good luck!
Vedika Vedika Bandhi
